summary: Guest Job Listings Feature Testing Complete. All 16 test cases passed. Frontend: 100% pass rate. Backend: Public jobs API working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GuestJobListings.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Login prompt modal correctly blocks job card clicks, apply button, and save button for guests
Guest navigation shows only Job Rocket logo, Login, and Register buttons as required
Guest banner 'You are browsing as a guest' is visible and styled appropriately
Authenticated user redirect from /browse-jobs to /jobs works correctly via Navigate component in App.js
View as Guest button on login page is positioned correctly below Create Account button
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test job for testing, then deleted after tests completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest Job Listings feature fully tested. Key components: GuestJobListings.js (standalone page), AuthPages.js (View as Guest button), App.js (routes for /browse-jobs). Public API endpoint: GET /api/public/jobs. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing.

browse_jobs_page_loads.details: /browse-jobs page loads correctly for unauthenticated users with nav, hero, search, filters, and footer

view_as_guest_button_visible.details: 'View as Guest' button visible on login page with data-testid='view-as-guest-btn', positioned below 'Create Account' button

view_as_guest_navigation.details: Clicking 'View as Guest' button navigates to /browse-jobs

guest_navbar_elements.details: Guest navbar shows 'Job Rocket' logo, 'Login' (data-testid='guest-nav-login-btn'), and 'Register' (data-testid='guest-nav-register-btn') buttons only

guest_banner_message.details: Guest banner message 'You are browsing as a guest' is visible

search_functionality.details: Search and filter functionality works on guest page. Search input (data-testid='guest-search-input'), location input (data-testid='guest-location-input'), search button (data-testid='guest-search-btn')

job_card_shows_modal.details: Clicking a job card (data-testid='guest-job-card') shows login prompt modal (data-testid='guest-login-prompt-modal')

apply_button_shows_modal.details: Clicking 'Sign In to Apply' button (data-testid='guest-apply-btn') shows login prompt modal

save_button_shows_modal.details: Clicking save/heart button (data-testid='guest-save-btn') shows login prompt modal

modal_has_buttons.details: Login prompt modal has 'Create Account' (data-testid='guest-modal-register-btn') and 'Sign In' (data-testid='guest-modal-login-btn') buttons

modal_sign_in_navigation.details: Modal 'Sign In' button navigates to / (login page)

logged_in_user_redirect.details: Logged-in users visiting /browse-jobs are redirected to /jobs

browse_jobs_not_in_nav.details: /browse-jobs is NOT shown in navigation for logged-in users

guest_nav_login_navigation.details: Guest nav 'Login' button navigates to / (login page)
